description.value:
Source: Ariadne's Book of Legends - Alpha v1.2, p. 54-57.

Level 23

Oathsworn Resolve

At 23rd level, you increase your Charisma score by 2, up to a maximum of 24.

Consecrated Oath

When you reach 23rd level, the energy of your oath grants you the qualities of otherworldly beings. You gain truesight out to 30 feet and become resistant to radiant and necrotic damage.

Greater Oathborn Miracle

Starting at 23rd level, the strength of your oath bestows upon you an additional divine miracle to bring forth. You gain a 7th-level spell slot. You can prepare spells of 7th level from the Cleric spell list. They count as Paladin spells for you.

source.custom: Original en-US text from Alpha v1.2
